Container.Name: PSFree
Container.Overview:
PSFree is a lightweight local HTTP server for hosting the PSFree PlayStation 4 jailbreak web interface.
Best practice: • Run in br0 network mode with its own IP address • Bind the container to port 80 on that IP
This allows simple DNS redirects without a reverse proxy.
Typical redirect: manuals.playstation.net → container IP
On PS4, opening the User Guide loads the exploit automatically.
